purpose: Record the boundary after finding a candidate address embedding from the 120-record carrier into a 900-address frame.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
This records a candidate address embedding only.
An address embedding is not transport closure.
An address embedding is not a full 41-seam lift.
No independent witness layer is proven.

summary.naming_caution: The source field anchor_reverse_to_900_map_found means candidate address embedding only, not transport closure.
summary.terminal_reason: A candidate injective address embedding from the 120-record carrier into a 900-address frame was found. The best injective fields are B plus C_plus_1, with 120 unique addresses and zero collisions. This is address evidence only. It is not transport closure, not a full 41-seam lift, not an independent witness, not full G900, and not Gap A closure.

boundary_record.short_form: A 120-to-900 address embedding exists, but transport has not been proven.
keeper_lines: A candidate 120-to-900 address embedding was found.
The best injective address fields are B plus C_plus_1.
The map gives 120 unique addresses with zero collisions.
The sharp 41-seam selector participates in the address embedding.
This is address evidence, not transport closure.
An address map is not a full 41-seam lift.
An address map is not an independent witness.
An address map is not full G900.
positive_results: The 120-record carrier was embedded into a 900-address frame in the tested coordinate family.
There were 18 sharp-seam injective candidate maps.
The best injective map used B and C_plus_1.
The best injective map produced 120 unique addresses.
The best injective map had zero collisions.
The earlier 41-seam selector B_plus_1 plus C_plus_1 survived as part of the address-map context.
negative_results: No transport closure was tested or proven.
No return cycle was tested or proven.
No independent witness layer was found.
No full G900 admission was found.
No source-native WXYZTI generator was derived.
blocked_promotions: Do not call an address embedding a transport map.
Do not call an address embedding a full 41-seam lift.
Do not call B plus C_plus_1 full G900.
Do not call this an independent witness layer.
Do not call this Gap A closure.
allowed_next_work: Test transport preservation on the candidate 120-to-900 address map.
Test whether anchor-and-reverse edges map to structured address transitions.
Test whether admitted records form a return-compatible subcycle in the address frame.
Search for an independent witness layer over the address embedding.
Use the address map as a constraint, not as a conclusion.

interpretation.main_result: A candidate 120-to-900 address embedding was found.
interpretation.meaning: The 120-record carrier can be placed injectively into a 900-address frame using B and C_plus_1.
interpretation.why_this_matters: The 41-seam selector is now connected to a larger 900-address frame rather than only a 120-record selector.
interpretation.why_not_closure: The result has no transport preservation test, no return cycle, no independent witness layer, and no full G900 admission.
interpretation.next_move: Test transport preservation on the candidate address map.

claim.short_form: A 120-to-900 address embedding exists, but transport has not been proven.
claim.not_closed_reason: The result has no transport preservation test, no return cycle, no independent witness layer, and no full G900 admission.
claim.next_problem: Test transport preservation on the candidate address map.
